---
title: "Particle Physics · Slides"
lang: en
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .quarto-title-block {
    display: none;
  }
</style>

<div class="course-index course-subpage">
  <nav class="course-profile-links" aria-label="Slide navigation">
    <a href="../../index.html">Course home</a>
    <a href="https://neutrinohit.github.io/">NeutrinoHit</a>
    <a href="https://neutrinohit.github.io/en/education.html#particle-physics-course">Course map</a>
  </nav>

  <section class="course-intro">
    <p class="course-kicker">English slides</p>
    <h1>Particle Physics</h1>
    <p>
      English HTML slide section for the full course. The lectures are in
      preparation; the permanent course structure is already in place.
    </p>
  </section>

  <section aria-label="English lecture plan">
    <h2 class="course-section-title">Lecture Cards</h2>
    <div class="course-card-grid">
      <article class="course-card is-planned"><span class="course-card-status">01 planned</span><h3>Particle-physics language</h3><p>HTML lecture in preparation.</p></article>
      <article class="course-card is-planned"><span class="course-card-status">02 planned</span><h3>Relativistic kinematics</h3><p>HTML lecture in preparation.</p></article>
      <article class="course-card is-planned"><span class="course-card-status">03 planned</span><h3>Symmetries and conservation laws</h3><p>HTML lecture in preparation.</p></article>
      <article class="course-card is-planned"><span class="course-card-status">04 planned</span><h3>Scattering and decays</h3><p>HTML lecture in preparation.</p></article>
      <article class="course-card is-planned"><span class="course-card-status">05 planned</span><h3>Quantum electrodynamics</h3><p>HTML lecture in preparation.</p></article>
      <article class="course-card is-planned"><span class="course-card-status">06 planned</span><h3>Weak interaction</h3><p>HTML lecture in preparation.</p></article>
      <article class="course-card is-planned"><span class="course-card-status">07 planned</span><h3>Quarks, hadrons, and QCD</h3><p>HTML lecture in preparation.</p></article>
      <article class="course-card is-planned"><span class="course-card-status">08 planned</span><h3>Electroweak unification</h3><p>HTML lecture in preparation.</p></article>
      <article class="course-card is-planned"><span class="course-card-status">09 planned</span><h3>Higgs mechanism</h3><p>HTML lecture in preparation.</p></article>
      <article class="course-card is-planned"><span class="course-card-status">10 planned</span><h3>Neutrinos</h3><p>HTML lecture in preparation.</p></article>
      <article class="course-card is-planned"><span class="course-card-status">11 planned</span><h3>Neutrino oscillations</h3><p>HTML lecture in preparation.</p></article>
      <article class="course-card is-planned"><span class="course-card-status">12 planned</span><h3>CP violation and flavor</h3><p>HTML lecture in preparation.</p></article>
      <article class="course-card is-planned"><span class="course-card-status">13 planned</span><h3>Particle detectors</h3><p>HTML lecture in preparation.</p></article>
      <article class="course-card is-planned"><span class="course-card-status">14 planned</span><h3>Colliders and beams</h3><p>HTML lecture in preparation.</p></article>
      <article class="course-card is-planned"><span class="course-card-status">15 planned</span><h3>Beyond the Standard Model</h3><p>HTML lecture in preparation.</p></article>
      <article class="course-card is-planned"><span class="course-card-status">16 planned</span><h3>Experimental frontier</h3><p>HTML lecture in preparation.</p></article>
    </div>
  </section>
</div>
```
